case_title: JOSE BARRUETTO VS. GMG JANITORIAL INC. A CALIF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MARGAIN, TOMAS E. SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR BARRUETTO, JOSE
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GMG JANITORIAL INC. A CALIF. CORP.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRUETTO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT GMG JANITORIAL INC. A CALIF. CORP.

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRUETTO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT GMG JANITORIAL INC. A CALIF. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GMG JANITORIAL INC. A CALIF. CORP. $3,092.45 PRINCIPAL, $43.75 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,237.20, TOTAL $3237.20
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GMG JANITORIAL INC. A CALIF. CORP.
